name: windieos
description: WindieOS desktop client for the AI Operating System layer.

scripts.package: npm run build:sidecar-runtime:full && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml
scripts.package:win:bundled-python:slim: npm run build:sidecar-runtime && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --win nsis
scripts.package:mac:bundled-python:slim: npm run build:sidecar-runtime && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --mac dmg zip
scripts.package:linux:bundled-python:slim: npm run build:sidecar-runtime && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm
scripts.package:win:bundled-python:full: npm run build:sidecar-runtime:full && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --win nsis
scripts.package:mac:bundled-python:full: npm run build:sidecar-runtime:full && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --mac dmg zip
scripts.package:linux:bundled-python:full: npm run build:sidecar-runtime:full && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm
scripts.package:win:bundled-python:core+browser: npm run build:sidecar-runtime:core+browser && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --win nsis
scripts.package:mac:bundled-python:core+browser: npm run build:sidecar-runtime:core+browser && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --mac dmg zip
scripts.package:linux:bundled-python:core+browse: npm run build:sidecar-runtime:core+browser && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm
scripts.lint:audit: npm run lint:audit:react && npm run lint:audit:deprecation
scripts.electron: WINDIE_PYTHON_PATH="${WINDIE_PYTHON_PATH:-${CONDA_PREFIX:+$CONDA_PREFIX/bin/python3}}" bash -lc 'echo "[WindieOS] Customer mode launch. Developers should run: npm run electron:dev"; if [ -z "${DISPLAY:-}" ] && command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 xvfb-run -a electron .; else ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron .; fi'
scripts.electron:dev: WINDIE_PYTHON_PATH="${WINDIE_PYTHON_PATH:-${CONDA_PREFIX:+$CONDA_PREFIX/bin/python3}}" bash -lc 'echo "[WindieOS] Developer mode launch (dev UI/source tags enabled)."; if [ -z "${DISPLAY:-}" ] && command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then WINDIE_DEV_UI=1 ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 xvfb-run -a electron .; else WINDIE_DEV_UI=1 ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron .; fi'
scripts.mock-memory-data: bash -lc 'if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python src/main/python/dev_seed_mock_memory.py; else python3 src/main/python/dev_seed_mock_memory.py; fi'
scripts.electron:mock-memory-data: npm run mock-memory-data && npm run electron
